title: February 6
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}
'''February 6''' is the 37th day of the year. There are 328 days remaining, (329 in leap years).</noinclude>

*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[D.C. Douglas]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[David Hayter]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 102|''Star Wars Weekly'' 102]] published.
*[[1984]] – ''[[The Final Trap]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[1994]] – [[Moses Ingram]] is born.
*[[1996]] – [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[1997]] – ''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'' published.
*[[2002]] – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 6|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 6]] published.
*[[2004]] – [[Star Wars Insider 74|''Star Wars Insider'' 74]] released for subscribers.
*[[2008]] – [[John Alvin]] dies.
*2008 – [[Legacy (2006) 19|''Legacy'' (2006) 19]] published.
*2008 – [[Rebellion 11|''Rebellion'' 11]] published.
*[[2009]] – "[[The Hidden Enemy]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2009 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Shadowed]]'' webcomic published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2013]] – [[Dark Times—Fire Carrier 1|''Dark Times—Fire Carrier'' 1]] published.
*[[2014]] – [[Star Wars Comic 7.2|''Star Wars Comic'' 7.2]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars Insider 187|''Star Wars Insider'' 187]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars (2015) 61|''Star Wars'' (2015) 61]] published.
*2019 – [[Age of Republic - Anakin Skywalker 1|''Age of Republic - Anakin Skywalker'' 1]] published.
*[[2021]] – [[Harry Fielder]] dies.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Knight Errant]]'' reprinted as part of ''[[The Essential Legends Collection]]''.
*2024 – ''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2024 – ''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'' reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2024 – [[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron (unabridged audiobook)|''X-Wing: Wraith Squadron'' unabridged audiobook]] released as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
<noinclude>
